Description
org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.convert
Spring Data MongoDB specific converter infrastructure.

    class 
    DefaultMongoTypeMapper
    Default implementation of MongoTypeMapper allowing configuration of the key to lookup and store type information in Document.

    MongoTypeMapper
    MappingMongoConverter.getTypeMapper()
     
    MongoTypeMapper
    MongoConverter.getTypeMapper()
    Returns the TypeMapper being used to write type information into Documents created with that converter.
    Methods in org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.convert with parameters of type MongoTypeMapper
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    MappingMongoConverter.setTypeMapper(@Nullable MongoTypeMapper typeMapper)
    Configures the MongoTypeMapper to be used to add type information to Documents created by the converter and how to lookup type information from Documents when reading them.
